title: Evaluate: Confidential Multi-Agent Consensus with FHE
description: Score the quality of this technical proposal (0-100). Consider novelty, feasibility, and clarity.
content: Conclave is a protocol that lets multiple AI agents collaboratively score a task without any agent ever seeing another's score. Each agent submits an FHE-encrypted score. The contract accumulates ciphertexts using FHE arithmetic (FHE.add, FHE.div) — the plaintext total is never computed on-chain or off-chain until the creator triggers threshold decryption via the Threshold Network. The final consensus is the average of all scores, computed entirely over encrypted values. No commit-reveal, no ZK proofs required.

rubric.21-50: Partial — interesting idea but significant gaps
rubric.51-80: Good — solid design with minor issues
